name: Spinach Pasta Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Orzo or pastini (tiny pasta for soup)
1/3 cup Chopped fresh spinach, rinsed, pressed dry, stems removed OR 1/3 10-oz. package frozen chopped spinach, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over medium-high heat, combine chicken broth, water, and tomato paste. Whisk until smooth.
2. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium.
3. Add pasta and cook 5 to 7 minutes, or until tender.
4. Stir in spinach and onions. Cook an additional 5 minutes.
5. Add pepper. Serve hot.
